feedback.text: Hello, I would like to suggest to expand this to Video Games also. Most recent example being game "The Crew" that publisher decided to stop supporting, which means nobody who bought a copy can play anymore. They purchased a "Licence" rather than a game, but they own a copy of the game, which one is it then. I wish customers have protections from publishers destroying video games. I'm afraid of "online only" games I own to stop working just because publisher just decides to stop supporting it, without any option for the customer. There is a similar initiative already with almost 1.5 million. Thank you.
